record.question: Remote work cần approval nào?
record.answer:
- Nguồn hr_remote_work.md: # HR Remote Work Policy - Probation employees may request remote work only after manager approval. - During probation, remote work is limited to 2 days per week unless HR approves an exception. - The employee must keep daily check-ins and remain reachable during core hours. - Sources: HR Remote Work Policy.
- Nguồn access_control_sop.md: # Access Control SOP - Level 2 access can be granted temporarily to contractors only with a business owner approval and Security approval. - Emergency Level 2 temporary contractor access expires after 24 hours and requires post-review by Security. - Level 3 emergency access requires two approvers: the system owner and 
- Sources: hr_remote_work.md, access_control_sop.md
